buildCommand: cd artifacts/solana-migrator && pnpm run build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('dist')) { const path = require('path'); const src = path.join(__dirname, 'dist'); const dest = path.join(__dirname, '../..', 'dist'); if (fs.existsSync(dest)) fs.rmSync(dest, { recursive: true }); fs.cpSync(src, dest, { recursive: true }); console.log('Copied dist to root'); } else { console.error('dist not found'); process.exit(1); }"
